Use subproofs for hypotheses. Use curly braces '{' and '}' to open and close subproofs.

7. B raa 2-6}
         ^, esta não é uma caixa (escopo) válida.Erro de sintaxe na linha 8:
8. A ->e 2,6

    - raa (1 range)

### SUBPROOFS / HYPOTHESES
Use subproofs for hypotheses. Use curly braces '{' and '}' to open and close subproofs.

- | = disjunction (or) 
- ~ = negation (not) 
- -> = implication (implies)
